title: Uncaged Fury
description: They pissed him off. They f****d with his shades. They should’ve brought more guys.
altHero: Johnny Cage pushing up his sunglasses with his middle finger
alt1: Johnny Cage fighting a bunch of guys in a warehouse
alt2: a woman in a red dress aims a bazooka
alt3: Johnny does the splits in the air to dodge the missile
alt4: Johnny taking his shades off with an explosion behind him
